selection: 按 4–7 岁 阅读者的常用词频与中小学词汇标记筛选

words.translation: n. 雄性动物, 雄猫
words.definition: n. male cat

words.translation: n. 国王, 君主；vt. 使...成为君主
words.definition: n. a male sovereign; ruler of a kingdom

words.translation: n. 母亲, 修女院长；vt. 产生, 照看, 收养
words.definition: n. a woman who has given birth to a child (also used as a term of address to your mother)

words.translation: n. 一点点, 少许, 一会儿, 短时间；a. 小的, 很少的, 幼小的, 琐碎的, 短暂的, 矮小的
words.definition: n. a small amount or duration

words.translation: n. 王后, 女王；vt. 立为女王
words.definition: n. the only fertile female in a colony of social insects such as bees and ants and termites; its function is to lay eggs

words.translation: n. 拇指；vt. 以拇指拨弄, 笨拙地摆弄, 用拇指翻旧, 迅速翻阅, 作搭车手势
words.definition: n. the thick short innermost digit of the forelimb

words.translation: a. 贫穷的, 贫乏的, 不幸的, 可怜的, 拙劣的, 卑鄙的
words.definition: a. having little money or few possessions

words.translation: adv. 不久, 早, 快, 宁可
words.definition: r. in the near future

words.translation: n. 狗, 坏蛋；vt. 跟踪, 尾随
words.definition: n. a member of the genus Canis (probably descended from the common wolf) that has been domesticated by man since prehistoric times; occurs in many breeds

words.translation: adv. 离去
words.definition: r. from a particular thing or place or position (`forth' is obsolete)

words.translation: n. 男孩
adv. 一次, 曾经, 一旦；conj. 一旦, 一经
words.definition: r. on one occasion

words.translation: a. 人工制成的, 成功的, 创造的；make的过去式和过去分词
words.definition: s. produced by a manufacturing process; rope and nails"

words.translation: n. 厨子, 厨师；vt. 烹调, 煮饭, 加热
words.definition: n. someone who cooks food

words.translation: n. 法院, 庭院, 奉承；vt. 献殷勤, 追求, 招致
words.definition: n. an assembly (including one or more judges) to conduct judicial business

words.translation: n. 空气, 旋律, 态度；vt. 晾, 使通风, 夸耀
words.definition: n. a mixture of gases (especially oxygen) required for breathing; the stuff that the wind consists of

words.translation: n. 老鼠, 胆小羞怯的人, 鼠标；vi. 捕鼠, 窥探
words.definition: n. any of numerous small rodents typically resembling diminutive rats having pointed snouts and small ears on elongated bodies with slender usually hairless tai

words.translation: n. 妻子, 太太, 夫人
words.definition: n. a married woman; a man's partner in marriage

words.translation: n. 母牛, 母兽；vt. 威胁
words.definition: n. female of domestic cattle: "`moo-cow' is a child's term"

words.translation: vt. 建立, 创立, 铸造；find的过去式和过去分词
n. 捕捉, 陷阱, 捕捉之物, 抓, 拉手；vt. 捕捉, 赶上, 感染, 听清楚
words.definition: n. a drawback or difficulty that is not readily evident

words.translation: n. 嘴, 口, 口腔, 口状物；vi. 装腔作势说话, 做鬼脸
words.definition: n. the opening through which food is taken in and vocalizations emerge

words.translation: n. 少量, 马嚼子, 辅币；vt. 给马上嚼子, 控制
words.definition: n. a small fragment of something broken off from the whole

words.translation: a. 长的, 长久的, 冗长的, 做多头的；vi. 渴望, 热望, 极想
words.definition: a. primarily temporal sense; being or indicating a relatively great or greater than average duration or passage of time or a duration as specified

words.translation: n. 公开, 户外, 空旷；a. 开着的, 开放的, 开阔的, 营业着的, 公开的, 悬而未决的
words.definition: n. a clear or unobstructed space or expanse of land or water

words.translation: v. 读, 阅读, 理解；a. 有学问的
words.definition: v. interpret something that is written or printed

words.translation: n. 儿子, 女婿, 子孙
words.definition: n. a male human offspring

words.translation: n. 想法, 思想, 思维, 关心, 挂念；think的过去式和过去分词
words.definition: n. the organized beliefs of a period or group or individual

words.translation: n. 全部, 全体, 整体, 完全之体系；a. 所有的, 完整的, 完全的, 纯粹的
words.definition: n. all of something including all its component elements or parts

words.translation: n. 碗, 木球, 大酒杯；v. 滚木球, 快而稳地行驶
words.definition: n. a round vessel that is open at the top; used chiefly for holding food or liquids;

words.translation: n. 猫, 恶妇；vi. 呕吐
words.definition: n. feline mammal usually having thick soft fur and no ability to roar: domestic cats; wildcats

words.translation: n. 医生, 博士；vt. 授以博士学位, 诊断, 修改
words.definition: n. a licensed medical practitioner

words.translation: n. 鱼, 鱼肉, 鱼类, 接合板；vt. 钓, 钓鱼, 查出, 用接合板连接
words.definition: n. any of various mostly cold-blooded aquatic vertebrates usually having scales and breathing through gills

words.translation: a. 热的, 热心的, 辣的, 热情的, 激动的, 猛烈的, 紧迫的；adv. 热, 紧迫地
words.definition: a. used of physical heat; having a high or higher than desirable temperature or giving off heat or feeling or causing a sensation of heat or burning

words.translation: adv. 在后地；prep. 在...背后
words.definition: r. in or to or toward the rear

words.translation: n. 切口, 割伤, 降低, 切, 割, 砍, 削, 伤口, 削减, 缩短, 删节, 通路；a. 经切割的, 缩减的
words.definition: n. a share of the profits

words.translation: n. 门
words.definition: n. a swinging or sliding barrier that will close the entrance to a room or building or vehicle

words.translation: a. 远的, 久远的, 遥远的；adv. 甚远地, 很, 到很深的程度, 到很远的距离
words.definition: a. located at a great distance in time or space or degree

words.translation: a. 坚硬的, 硬的, 难的, 艰苦的, 困难的, 坚固的, 猛烈的, 艰难的, 结实的, 确实的；adv. 坚硬地, 努力地, 辛苦地, 接近地, 猛烈地, 牢固地
words.definition: a. dispassionate;

words.translation: n. 历史, 过去, 经历, 发展过程, 历史学, 过去的事, 历史记录
words.definition: n. the aggregate of past events

words.translation: n. 中央, 中间, 腰部；a. 中央的, 中庸的, 中间的
words.definition: n. an intermediate part or section

words.translation: n. 名字, 名称, 姓名, 名义, 名誉, 文件名；vt. 命名, 称呼, 任命, 提名, 列举
words.definition: n. a language unit by which a person or thing is known

words.translation: n. 薪资, 付款, 补偿；vt. 支付, 付清, 补偿, 偿还, 对...有利, 为...涂防水物
n. 游戏, 游玩, 玩笑, 运动, 比赛, 赌博, 跳动, 表演, 剧本；v. 玩, 游戏, 假装, 开玩笑, 比赛, 扮演, 演奏, 演戏, 传摇曳, (使)跳动
words.definition: n. a dramatic work intended for performance by actors on a stage

words.translation: a. 红的, 红色的, 红肿的, 流血的；n. 红色, 红颜料, 赤字
words.definition: s. of a color at the end of the color spectrum (next to orange); resembling the color of blood or cherries or tomatoes or rubies

words.translation: n. 水, 雨水, 海水, 水位, 水面, 流水；vt. 给...浇水, 供以水, 注入水, 使湿
words.definition: n. binary compound that occurs at room temperature as a clear colorless odorless tasteless liquid; freezes into ice below 0 degrees centigrade and boils above 1

words.translation: n. 白色, 洁白, 眼白, 白种人, 蛋白；a. 白色的, 纯洁的, 白种的, 苍白的, 空白的, 幸运的
words.definition: n. the quality or state of the achromatic color of greatest lightness (bearing the least resemblance to black)

words.translation: a. 宽的, 广阔的, 普遍的, 宽阔的, 广泛的, 一般的；adv. 广阔地, 遍及各处地, 广泛地
words.definition: a. having great (or a certain) extent from one side to the other

words.translation: n. 亲爱的人；a. 亲爱的, 昂贵的, 严重的, 急迫的
n. 去, 离去, 工作情况, 地面状况, 行为；a. 进行中的, 流行的, 成功的, 现存的
words.definition: n. advancing toward a goal

words.translation: prep. 直到, 在...以前, 迄；conj. 直到...为止
words.definition: n. unstratified soil deposited by a glacier; consists of sand and clay and gravel and boulders mixed together

words.translation: num. 五, 五个
words.definition: n. the cardinal number that is the sum of four and one

words.translation: n. 狮子, 狮子(星)座, 国际狮子会会员
words.definition: n. large gregarious predatory feline of Africa and India having a tawny coat with a shaggy mane in the male

words.translation: n. 袋子, 袋状物；vt. 使膨大, 装袋, 猎获
words.definition: n. a flexible container with a single opening

words.translation: n. 床, 睡眠处, 河床, 底座, 路基, 一层；vt. 提供宿处, 栽种, 安装

words.translation: n. 四轮大马车, 教练；vt. 训练, 指导

words.translation: n. 叫声, 哭声, 大叫；vi. 哭, 叫, 喊
words.definition: n. a loud utterance; often in protest or opposition

words.translation: n. 乐趣, 玩笑, 娱乐；vi. 开玩笑
words.definition: n. activities that are enjoyable or amusing

words.translation: n. 孔, 洞, 穴, 漏洞；vt. 挖洞, 掘坑
words.definition: n. an opening into or through something

words.translation: n. 家, 避难所, 故乡；a. 家庭的, 国内的, 打中目标的

words.translation: n. 内部, 内脏, 内幕；a. 内部的, 秘密的, 户内的

words.translation: n. 跳跃, 跳动, 暴涨, 惊跳；vt. 跳跃, 跃过, 突升, 使跳跃

words.translation: n. 厂主, 蛾；[机] 铣床

words.translation: n. 谋杀；vt. 谋杀, 损毁, 破坏
words.definition: n. unlawful premeditated killing of a human being by a human being

words.translation: a. 美好的, 和蔼的, 正派的, 做得好的, 精密的, 细微的, 挑剔的, 谨慎的

words.translation: n. 雨, 下雨, 雨天；vi. 下雨

words.translation: n. 大小, 尺寸, 规模, 尺码, 能力, 浆料；vt. 上浆, 依大小排列

words.translation: n. 睡眠, 静止, 昏迷, 麻木, 长眠, 冬眠；vi. 睡觉, 睡眠, 静止

words.translation: n. 春天, 弹簧, 跳跃, 弹性, 活力, 泉, 源泉；a. 春天的

words.translation: adv. 几乎, 差不多

words.translation: a. 坏的；n. 坏

words.translation: a. 清楚的, 明确的, 澄清的；adv. 清晰地

words.translation: n. 落下, 瀑布, 采伐量, 下降, 落差, 降低, 堕落, 秋天；vi. 倒下, 落下, 来临, 失守, 阵亡, 下跌, 减弱, 倾斜, 垮台, 轮到, 变成, 降低

words.translation: n. 信, 字母, 证书, 字面意义, 铅字, 学问, 出租人；vt. 写字母于, 在...上刻字母, 用字母标明

words.translation: prep. 直到, 在...以前；conj. 直到...时, 在...以前

words.translation: adv. 然后, 后来

words.translation: n. 盘子, 碟, 菜肴

words.translation: a. 空的, 空虚的, 空腹的, 空洞的；n. 空的东西, 空车

words.translation: n. 日落, 同伙, 组合, 集合, 装置；vt. 放, 安置, 放置, 设定, 使凝结, 点燃, 确定, 点缀, 使就位, 树立, 分配, 调整

words.translation: n. 住址, 演说, 举止, 灵巧, 求爱；vt. 发表(演说或讲话), 对付, 写地址
